comments:
Audio buffer molecules for raw audio data handling.

## AudioBuffer
Raw audio data with sample rate, channel count, and duration.
The fundamental container for digital audio.

## AudioRegion
A slice of an AudioBuffer with start/end markers and gain.
Used for non-destructive editing.

## AudioClip
A playable audio unit with region, fade curves, and playback options.
The basic building block for audio composition.

declarations.comments:
SampleRate - audio sample rate in Hz.
Bounded to standard rates: 8000 Hz (telephony) to 192000 Hz (high-res).
declarations.title: SampleRate

declarations.comments: Check if sample rate is high resolution (>= 96 kHz).
declarations.title: isHighResSampleRate

declarations.comments: Check if first sample rate is higher than second.
declarations.title: sampleRateHigherThan

declarations.comments:
BitDepth - bits per sample.
Bounded to standard depths: 8-bit (lo-fi) to 32-bit (float).
declarations.title: BitDepth

declarations.comments: Check if bit depth is professional quality (>= 24-bit).
declarations.title: isProfessionalBitDepth

declarations.comments:
ChannelCount - number of audio channels.
Bounded to 1-8 for standard configurations.
declarations.title: ChannelCount

declarations.comments: Check if stereo or more channels.
declarations.title: isStereoOrMore

declarations.comments: Check if surround sound (5.1 or more).
declarations.title: isSurround

declarations.comments:
AudioBuffer - raw audio data container.
Represents PCM audio with sample rate, bit depth, channels, and frame count.
Actual sample data would be stored externally (ArrayBuffer, etc.).
declarations.title: AudioBuffer

declarations.comments: Check if two buffers have the same format (rate, depth, channels).
declarations.title: sameBufferFormat

declarations.comments: Check if buffer is empty (zero frames).
declarations.title: isEmptyBuffer

declarations.comments:
AudioRegion - a non-destructive slice of an AudioBuffer.
Defines start/end points, gain, and fade curves.
declarations.title: AudioRegion

declarations.comments: Check if region is valid (has positive length and valid gain).
declarations.title: isValidRegion

declarations.comments:
AudioClip - a playable audio unit.
Combines a region with playback options.
declarations.title: AudioClip

declarations.comments: Check if clip has pitch shifting (pitch ratio != 1.0).
declarations.title: isPitchShifted

declarations.comments: Get display label for loop mode.
declarations.title: loopModeLabel

declarations.comments: Check if loop mode enables looping.
declarations.title: isLooping

declarations.comments:
Classify audio format quality tier.
Returns "archival" for lossless, "streaming" for high-bitrate lossy,
"efficient" for low-latency lossy formats.
declarations.title: formatQualityTier

declarations.comments: Check if two formats are different.
declarations.title: formatsDiffer

declarations.comments:
Calculate gain adjustment to invert current gain around unity.
If gain is 0.5, returns -0.5 (to adjust by 0.5 to reach 1.0).
If gain is 1.5, returns 0.5 (to adjust by -0.5 to reach 1.0).
declarations.title: gainAdjustmentToUnity

name: Hydrogen.Schema.Audio.Buffer
